Container.Name: Tally
Container.Overview: Self-hosted personal finance for households. Track accounts, transactions, budgets, savings goals, and debt. CSV and PDF bank statement import with reconciliation. Dracula theme. Single Docker container.
Container.Description: Self-hosted personal finance for households. Track accounts, transactions, budgets, savings goals, and debt. CSV and PDF bank statement import with reconciliation. Dracula theme. Single Docker container.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port Tally listens on. Access the app at http://[serverIP]:[this port].

Config.Name: Data Volume
Config.Description: SQLite database storage. Must be a persistent path on the host.

Config.Name: Financial Data Volume
Config.Description: Read-only directory for bank statement files (CSV/PDF) available for import.

Config.Name: SECRET_KEY
Config.Description: JWT signing key. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32

Config.Name: FIRST_RUN_OWNER_USERNAME
Config.Description: Auto-creates the first owner account on startup. Leave blank to use the setup page instead.

Config.Name: AI_PROVIDER
Config.Description: AI provider for the chat feature: anthropic, openai, or ollama (any OpenAI-compatible endpoint). Leave unset to disable the chat page.

Config.Name: AI_API_KEY
Config.Description: API key for the selected AI provider. Not required for local Ollama.

Config.Name: AI_MODEL
Config.Description: Model name to use (e.g. claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022, gpt-4o, llama3). Defaults to provider default if left blank.

Config.Name: AI_BASE_URL
Config.Description: Base URL for OpenAI-compatible endpoints (e.g. http://ollama:11434/v1). Required for Ollama; leave blank for Anthropic or OpenAI.
